title: A Little Girl in a Big City
writer: Randolph Bartlett, James Kyrle MacCurdy, Victoria Moore
actors: Gladys Walton, Niles Welch, Mary Thurman
plot: Small-town girl Mary Barry wins a beauty contest and goes to New York to meet D. V. Cortelyou, the magazine's publisher. Greatly taken by young girl, Cortelyou arranges for her to live with Dolly Griffith, a woman of questionable ...
